openmeter/credit/hook.purpose: Lifecycle hook implementations bridging the credit/grant domain into the entitlement service hook registry. Currently owns a single PreDelete hook that deletes all grants for a metered entitlement before the entitlement is removed.

patterns.name: Embed NoopHook for unimplemented lifecycle methods
patterns.description: Every hook struct embeds models.NoopServiceHook[entitlement.Entitlement] (aliased NoopHook) so only the relevant lifecycle methods need overriding, satisfying the full interface without boilerplate.
patterns.example: type entitlementHook struct { NoopHook; grantRepo grant.Repo }

patterns.name: Type-alias hook interfaces at package boundary
patterns.description: Export typed aliases (EntitlementHook, NoopHook) parameterising the generic models types with entitlement.Entitlement, decoupling callers from the type parameter.

patterns.name: Nil-check then type-assert before acting
patterns.description: Every hook method nil-checks the entity, then type-asserts via meteredentitlement.ParseFromGenericEntitlement; unknown sub-types return nil (silent no-op), never an error.
patterns.example: if ent == nil { return nil }; meteredEnt, err := meteredentitlement.ParseFromGenericEntitlement(ent); if err != nil { return nil }

patterns.name: Constructor returns the interface, not the concrete struct
patterns.description: NewEntitlementHook returns EntitlementHook (the interface alias), not *entitlementHook, so callers cannot depend on the concrete type.
patterns.example: func NewEntitlementHook(grantRepo grant.Repo) EntitlementHook { return &entitlementHook{grantRepo: grantRepo} }

key_file_guides.role: Sole file: EntitlementHook/NoopHook aliases, the concrete entitlementHook struct, its constructor, and PreDelete. Wired into entitlement.Service via RegisterHooks in app/common.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding hook methods that call grantRepo without nil-checking the entity or type-asserting to meteredentitlement first will panic or corrupt non-metered entitlement deletes.

anti_patterns: Returning an error for an unrecognised entitlement sub-type — unknown sub-types must silently return nil
Adding logic reaching outside credit/grant (calling balance or engine packages) — this hook owns only grant cleanup
Registering this hook against a non-entitlement service hook registry — it is parameterised on entitlement.Entitlement only

decisions.decision: Embed models.NoopServiceHook instead of implementing the full interface
decisions.rationale: The hook only needs PreDelete; embedding NoopHook provides all other methods as no-ops and keeps future interface additions from breaking the build.

decisions.decision: Type-assert via meteredentitlement.ParseFromGenericEntitlement rather than switching on a kind constant
decisions.rationale: ParseFromGenericEntitlement encapsulates sub-type detection in the metered package, keeping the hook free of kind constants and resilient to new entitlement types.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new lifecycle method targeting metered entitlements only
